titleStmt.title: SII 35.76: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 76. (A.R. No. 92 of 1951-52.) RAṬṬIHAḶḶI, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the Mukhamaṇḍapa of the Kadaṁbēśvara temple.
This inscription referring to Siṁghaṇadēva is dated Śaka 1161, Viḷaṁbi, Āshāḍha śu. 15, [lunar] eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1238, June 28.

It registers the gift of the toll income on eleven bullocks to god Kaḍambēśvara for burning a perpetual lamp, by Gubbiya Kalleya (Karaṇada Kalla), the officer in charge of taxes. He was the son of Chāvaṇa and Māḷave, and a minister of Honnabamma. The gift was made over to Mūṟujāvidēva. It also registers a gift of land to the god by Bārika Bīreya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ bhāya śaṁbhavē
yādavakulābdhicaṁdraṁ kādaṁbakuḷāriyenipa siṁghaṇarāya
mēdiniyanāḷutippaṁgādaṁ sacivāgragaṇyanāriya mallaṁ . Āta
na kulōṁnatiyeṁteṁdaḍe . vudubhavisidanaṁdāgaḷu yadukula
doḷu kriṣṇanaṁte yāriya baṁmmagudiyisidaṁ puṁṇyātmaṁ sadamaḷanidhi
mallaneṁbana pratimallaṁ . Ātana sati rājavegaṁ nītividaṁ vīra hoṁ
nabaṁmaṁ cauḍaṁ khyātividaṁ Accaḷaiyyaṁ sātisayōktiyoḷu puṭṭi
da¨rnnijatanujarū . Avaroḷage hoṁnabaṁma śivabhaktavaraprasā
daneṁdanisutaṁ kavigamakivādivāgmigaḷavanīvaṁ gumitamallināthana dayadiṁ .
vri . koṁkaṇacakrava¨rtti birudiṁgadi¨rkkaṁ ghanarāyaseṭṭiyoṁdaṁka
da gaṁdhavāraṇanu dānavinōdanu guptamallanī śaṁkarapāda padmamadhu
paṁ paranārīsahōdaraṁge nissaṁkabana hoṁnabaṁmaneṇeyo¨rppāṭi
pāsaṭi bhūtaḷāgradoḷo . Ātana pradhānaṁ karaṇada kallana guṇōṁnati E
ṁteṁdaḍe . śaraṇene kāyvanaṁji muṟevokka virōdhiyanājiraṁgadoḷura
damē tanavolu ripuvaṁ paridaṭṭa muṭuvaṁ parabaḷa sādhakāṁkadha
vayyanuvidaneṁbudī kara koṁḍeyara gaṁḍanoḷā¨rdore bhūtaḷāgrado
ḷūṁna nalla gubbiya kallana mahimeyeṁteṁdaḍe . bhūtahita cāvaṇaṁga nītiguṇō
dbhūteyenipa māḷavegaṁ tāṁ khyātiparanensi dha¨rmmakkāturanivanensi negaḷda gubbiya
kallaṁ . Aṁtātaṁ suṁkava nōḍuti¨rddu dha¨rmmaprasaṁgadiṁda
mūṟujāvidēva¨rgge besakeydanā muniya prabhāvaveṁteṁdaḍe . ka . pāpanaga śaṁbha ve
nipaṁ kōpajitaṁ sakaḷaśāstrapariṇataneṁdeṁdī pariya pogaḷutippudu śāpā
nugrahana mūṟujāviyenallaṁ . svasti sakava¨rṣa 1161 neya viḷaṁbi saṁvatsarada
Āṣāḍha su 15 sōmagrahaṇa saṁkramaṇadaṁdu śrī kaḍaṁbēśvaradēva¨rgge naṁdāvaḷaka
ṁ śrīgaṁdhakkeṁdu mūṟujāvidēva¨rgge gubbiya kalleyaṁ pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ geydu dhārā
pū¨rvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa hanoṁdettina suṁ 1 ga kavanu maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī .
bārika bīreyanu kaḍaṁbēśvaradēvarige dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa bhūmi teṁkaṇa hola
Digital edition of SII 35.76 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
